name: tavern
description: Tavern — self-hosted Discord-shaped community app for gaming groups, tabletop RPGs, and board gamers

scripts.ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:integration && pnpm build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm ensure-env && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --filter @tavern/db migrate
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm ensure-env && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --filter @tavern/db migrate:dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm ensure-env && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --filter @tavern/db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm ensure-env && node scripts/with-env.mjs pnpm --filter @tavern/db reset
scripts.docker:up: node scripts/garage-config.mjs && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && node scripts/garage-bootstrap.mjs
scripts.docker:up:all: node scripts/garage-config.mjs && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile livekit up -d && node scripts/garage-bootstrap.mjs
scripts.docker:up:full: node scripts/garage-config.mjs && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile apps --profile livekit up -d --build && node scripts/garage-bootstrap.mjs
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile apps --profile livekit down
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile apps --profile livekit logs -f
